# Reference list of python packages used by the analysis layer.
#
# A fresh NAF account needs NO pip installs: `source env/setup.sh` provides
# python3 with pyyaml, numpy, matplotlib, scikit-learn, xgboost, and torch
# from the key4hep stack on cvmfs; pyLCIO/ROOT/Marlin come from the same
# stack.
#
# This file exists for two optional cases:
#   1. running the pure-python parts on a laptop;
#   2. adding extra packages (e.g. catboost) in a local venv on /data/dust:
#        python3 -m venv --system-site-packages .venv
#        source .venv/bin/activate && pip install catboost

pyyaml>=6.0
numpy>=1.22
matplotlib>=3.5
scikit-learn>=1.1
xgboost>=1.7
pytest>=7.0
# optional alternative baseline model:
# catboost>=1.2
